title: DiagnosticEvent
description: Structured event emitted by agent probe runs. Compatible with MindshardAGENT ActivityStream entries and diaglab probe captures. Import or copy this schema to validate or consume probe exports across apps.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the event was emitted

source.description: Component or subsystem that emitted the event (e.g. 'engine', 'agent', 'tool', 'rag', 'budget', 'planner')

kind.description:
Event severity / classification:
  info  — normal operation
  warn  — degraded or unexpected but non-fatal
  error — failure
  model — model invocation / inference event
  tool  — tool call dispatch / result
  phase — pipeline stage transition
  debug — verbose diagnostic, not shown in normal views

payload.description: Optional structured data attached to the event (e.g. token counts, scores, latency)
